sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT net_sol AS net, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_id, mint ORDER BY entry_ts) AS ord FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL), pm AS (SELECT mint, COUNT(*) AS entries, SUM(net_sol) AS net FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mint), pmlm AS (SELECT mint, COUNT(*) AS entries, SUM(net_sol) AS net FROM copy_trades WHERE execution_mode='live_micro' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mint) SELECT '1_reentry_ord' AS section, CASE WHEN ord=1 THEN 'e1_first' WHEN ord=2 THEN 'e2_second' WHEN ord=3 THEN 'e3_third' ELSE 'e4_plus' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(net),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net),4) AS avg_net FROM ranked GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT '2_permint_h30m', CAST(entries AS TEXT), COUNT(*), NULL, ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4) FROM pm GROUP BY entries UNION ALL SELECT '3_permint_livemicro', CAST(entries AS TEXT), COUNT(*), NULL, ROUND(SUM(net),3), ROUND(AVG(net),4) FROM pmlm GROUP BY entries ORDER BY 1,2
